summary: Sprint 1 added example question chips and loading skeleton -- the two most impactful UX gaps. The remaining UX issues center around: (1) the core query flow is still non-functional (LLM stubbed), so users always see a 501 error, (2) no query history persistence, (3) raw database column names in results table, (4) no number formatting for baseball stats, (5) page.tsx at 189 lines is a single monolithic client component. The 501 error message is developer-facing and confusing to end users.

findings.title: 501 error message 'LLM integration not yet configured' confuses users
findings.detail: When a user submits a question, they see 'LLM integration not yet configured' -- a developer message. Until LLM is wired, this should be user-friendly.
findings.recommendation: Change the 501 detail to: 'The AI assistant is being set up. Please check back soon.'

findings.title: No query history -- users lose previous questions on page refresh
findings.detail: Each query replaces the previous result. Users cannot see or revisit past questions. No localStorage persistence. Already in todo.md P3 but should be promoted to P1.
findings.recommendation: Add a history array to state, push each {question, response, timestamp}. Persist to localStorage. Display as scrollable list.

findings.title: No explicit empty state for zero query results
findings.detail: When a query returns zero results, the Results card is simply not rendered. Users may think it's broken.
findings.recommendation: Show an explicit empty state card: 'No matching records found. Try broadening your search.'

findings.title: Textarea lacks aria-label for screen readers
findings.detail: The Textarea has no aria-label or associated <label>. Screen readers announce it generically. Flagged in Sprint 1 (UX-006), in todo.md, still not fixed.
findings.recommendation: Add aria-label='Ask a baseball statistics question' to the Textarea.

findings.title: Results table missing accessibility attributes
findings.detail: Table has no <caption>, <th> lacks scope='col'. Already in todo.md (UX-007) but not fixed.
findings.recommendation: Add caption, scope='col' to <th>, aria-label to table wrapper.

findings.title: Results table shows raw DB column names
findings.detail: Column headers show 'player_mlb_id', 'batting_avg', 'wrc_plus'. Already tracked (UX-004) but should be promoted -- low-effort, high-visibility.
findings.recommendation: Create columnDisplayMap and apply in header render.

findings.title: No copy-to-clipboard for SQL or results
findings.detail: Users cannot copy the generated SQL. A copy button would help power users.

findings.title: No dark/light mode toggle
findings.detail: Uses dark: Tailwind variants but no toggle. Only follows system preference.
findings.recommendation: Add theme toggle button using next-themes.
